metadata.title: Terms of Service - BloodLink
metadata.description: Review the terms of service for BloodLink platform. Legal information about using our property management services.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: These terms govern your access to and use of the BloodLink application. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree not to disclose your password to third parties and to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content: You agree not to use our services in any abusive, illegal, or unauthorized manner. You must comply with all applicable local, national, and international laws when using our services.

privacy.title: Privacy and Data Protection
privacy.content: We process your personal data in accordance with our Privacy Policy and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Your data is stored securely and is never sold to third parties.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. To the extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, regarding our services.

modifications.title: Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be communicated via email or through an in-app notification. Your continued use of our services after such modifications constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without notice, in the event of a violation of these terms or for any other reason deemed necessary.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions regarding these terms of service, please contact us at: support@pamgroupmaroc.com

calculation.title: Manual charge calculation
calculation.description: Spreadsheets, errors and time lost on allocations and adjustments.

documents.title: Scattered documents
documents.description: Contracts, minutes and invoices scattered — hard to track versions and compliance.

communication.title: Slow communication
communication.description: Tenant requests and internal approvals lack a central workflow.

tracking.title: Inefficient tracking
tracking.description: Payment delays and maintenance issues without automated alerts.

scalability.title: Guaranteed Scalability

dashboard.title: Smart Dashboard
dashboard.description: Centralize all your property data in a modern and intuitive dashboard. Track your KPIs in real-time with advanced visualizations and customizable metrics.

properties.title: Property Management
properties.description: Centralize your properties, types and characteristics. Create, modify and track your properties in a few clicks with a clear workflow.

tenants.title: Tenant Management
tenants.description: Simplify tenant management with dedicated tools: payment tracking, direct communication, maintenance request management and complete history.

documents.title: Document Management
documents.description: Complete document management system with electronic signature, automatic archiving and regulatory compliance. Secure access from anywhere.

ai.title: AI Chat
ai.description: An integrated intelligent assistant to answer your questions, speed up your tasks and guide you through the platform.

textReveal.text: Manage your real estate portfolio with complete simplicity. Automate, secure, prosper.

journey.title: Adoption
journey.subtitle: Get started in 4 simple steps and transform your property management

step1.title: Connect your properties
step1.description: Easily import all your buildings, rental units, lease agreements and common charges into the platform. Quick synchronization that centralizes all your property data in just a few clicks.

step2.title: Activate AI
step2.description: Let artificial intelligence optimize your management: automatic charge allocation, smart notifications and assisted responses to save time on repetitive tasks.

step3.title: Collaborate
step3.description: Create a real-time collaborative portal where owners, managers, tenants and service providers can interact effectively. Fluid communication and guaranteed transparency for all stakeholders.

step4.title: Measure & optimize
step4.description: Analyze your performance with detailed KPIs, generate automated reports and receive personalized recommendations to reduce your costs and maximize your profitability.

faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our property management platform, our features and our support.

q1.question: How does BloodLink simplify the management of my properties?
q1.answer: BloodLink centralizes all your processes: tenant management, payment tracking, preventive maintenance, digital documents and unified communication. No more juggling between multiple tools, everything is accessible from a single intuitive platform.

q2.question: Can I digitize my existing paper documents?
q2.answer: Absolutely! Our system allows you to import and organize all your existing documents. Automatic scanning, OCR recognition, intelligent classification by property and tenant. No more binders and lost documents.

q3.question: How does rent reminder automation work?
q3.answer: The system automatically detects payment delays and sends personalized reminders by email/SMS according to your settings. Progressive escalation, response tracking and automatic generation of collection reports.

q4.question: Can predictive maintenance really reduce my costs?
q4.answer: Yes, on average 30% savings! Our AI analyzes your equipment history, predicts failures and plans preventive interventions. Network of partner craftsmen with negotiated rates included.

q5.question: How to effectively manage communication with my tenants?
q5.answer: Centralized communication hub with integrated messaging, tenant portal, automatic notifications and complete history. Your tenants can report problems, consult their documents and communicate in real time.

q6.question: Is my data secure on the platform?
q6.answer: Bank-level security guaranteed: AES-256 encryption, ISO 27001 certified hosting, automatic backups, multi-factor access and GDPR compliance. Your data is more secure than on your local computer.

q7.question: Does BloodLink integrate with my existing accounting tools?
q7.answer: Native integration with major accounting software (Sage, Ciel, EBP) and Moroccan banks. Automatic export of entries, bank reconciliation and generation of financial statements compliant with Moroccan legislation.

q8.question: What support do you offer for onboarding?
q8.answer: Complete training included: personalized onboarding, data migration, team training and technical support 6 days/7. Our team of experts supports you until you achieve complete autonomy.

provisions.title: Monthly Provisions
provisions.description: Set the provision amount for all units
provisions.amountLabel: Monthly amount applied to all units

occupants.title: JIT input — Occupants
occupants.description: Enter the number of occupants for each selected unit. The value will be saved and used for the calculation.
occupants.invalidDescription: The number of occupants must be an integer ≥ 0

surface.title: JIT input — Surface (m²)
surface.description: Adjust the surface used for the calculation for each selected unit. The value will be saved and used for the calculation.
surface.invalidDescription: Surface must be a strictly positive number

tantieme.title: JIT input — Shares
tantieme.description: Enter the shares used for the distribution for each selected unit. The value will be saved and used for the calculation.
tantieme.invalidDescription: Shares must be a strictly positive integer

step4.title: Select the period
step4.description: Define the charge calculation period (minimum 1 month)

validation.tooShortDescription: The period must be at least 30 days (1 month)

step4.tooShortSummary: Period too short: {days} day(s) • Minimum: {minDays} days

step5.completedDescription: Here is the charge distribution for

equitable.label: Equal Distribution
equitable.description: Dons distributed equally among all selected units.

surface.label: Distribution by Surface
surface.description: Dons distributed according to the living area of each unit.

tantieme.label: Distribution by Shares
tantieme.description: Dons distributed according to condominium shares.

occupants.label: Distribution by Occupants
occupants.description: Dons distributed according to the number of occupants per unit.

toast.periodTooShortDescription: The period must be at least 30 days (1 month)
toast.calculationErrorDescription: An error occurred while running the calculation. Please check the entered information and try again. If the problem persists, please contact your administrator.

drawer.title: Regularisation Calculation Wizard
drawer.description: Follow the steps to calculate charge distribution

breakdownHelp.title: Understand these amounts
breakdownHelp.chargesDescription: share of actual charges allocated to each unit for the period.
breakdownHelp.provisionsDescription: amount already paid by the tenant during the same period.
breakdownHelp.balanceNegativeDescription: provisions are lower than charges → amount still to be paid by the tenant.
breakdownHelp.balancePositiveDescription: provisions are higher than charges → amount to refund or credit to the tenant.

confirmRestore.title: Restore this calculation
confirmRestore.description: Do you confirm the restoration of this calculation? It will be reintegrated into the main list.
confirmRestore.descriptionBulk: Do you confirm the restoration of these calculations? They will be reintegrated into the main list.

confirmArchive.title: Archive this calculation
confirmArchive.description: Are you sure you want to archive this regularisation calculation? You can restore it at any time from the archives page.
confirmArchive.descriptionBulk: Are you sure you want to archive the {count} selected calculations? You can restore them at any time from the archives page.
